exploration_notes:
Implemented the bulk silence creation API for Prometheus. Three files were modified/created:

1. **`web/api/v1/api.go`** — Added `silenceCreator SilenceCreator` field to the `API` struct, registered `POST /silences/bulk` route in the `Register()` method using `wrapAgent` (blocking in agent mode), and added a `SetSilenceCreator()` setter method.

2. **`web/api/v1/silences_bulk.go`** (new) — Contains the `Silence`, `SilenceMatcher`, and `BulkSilenceResponse` types, the `SilenceCreator` interface,
